data.acceptance:
- [ ] User can type a search query when prompted to select a model
- [ ] List filters in real-time as text is typed (case-insensitive substring match)
- [ ] Example searches work correctly: "glm", "minimax", "qwen" (and mixed-case variants) return relevant results
- [ ] Backspacing/clearing search shows the full model list again
- [ ] Filtered results count is visible (e.g., "3 of 175 models match" or similar)
- [ ] Search is responsive with 175+ models (no perceptible lag when typing)
- [ ] User can select a model from filtered results via number/arrow keys
- [ ] No regression: model selection works normally if user does not search
